plugins.name: tat-core
plugins.description: Foundational infrastructure for tat-marketplace: /tat-update command, SessionStart auto-update hook and personal rules-fallback (tat-rules.md).

plugins.name: tat-explain-tools
plugins.description: Read-direction skills (tat-*) to understand existing systems: architecture, domains, integrations. No new design or code generation.

plugins.name: tat-opsx-openspec
plugins.description: OpenSpec workflow skills generated from tobias-agent-toolkit core.

plugins.name: tat-review-tools
plugins.description: Review, governance, cleanup skills and security agent for the tat marketplace.
